prompt: I need to update the price assumption in my model from $100 to $125 and then verify the change took effect.
assertions: Runs idfa_ops.py write to set Inp_Price to 125
Runs idfa_ops.py read to verify the value is 125
Both commands produce JSON output with status 'ok'
The operation preserves all existing Named Ranges and formulas
Does not use raw openpyxl or manual cell editing
